{"id":"smallhold-chxy","title":"Hashtag following","description":"## What
Allow personas to follow hashtags so that public posts containing those tags appear in the home timeline. Includes followed_hashtags schema, follow/unfollow endpoints, and home timeline query extension.

## Why
Hashtag following is a first-class Mastodon feature (added in 4.x) and expected by Ivory, Elk, and other modern clients. Without it, the hashtag follow UI in those clients silently does nothing.

## Phases covered
- followed_hashtags schema + GET/POST/DELETE /api/v1/followed_tags endpoints
- Home timeline UNION branch for posts containing followed hashtags","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T04:20:00Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T04:20:00Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-cavw","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:20:42Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-x4mh","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:20:38Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
